# UX Checklist: Return a Single Estimated Value

**Purpose**: Validate UX requirements completeness, clarity, and coverage for single-value estimates.
**Created**: 2026-03-10
**Feature**: `/home/ayra/ECE_493/Capstone-Test-Repo/specs/013-single-value-estimate/spec.md`

**Note**: This checklist is generated by the `/speckit.checklist` command based on feature context and requirements.

## Requirement Completeness

- [x] CHK001 Are user-visible outcomes specified for success, validation failure, normalization failure, valuation failure, missing baseline warning, and missing feature warning? [Completeness, Spec §Main Flow, Spec §Alternate Flows, Spec §Exception / Error Flows]
- [x] CHK002 Are UI requirements defined for single-value prominence and no-range display? [Completeness, Spec §Functional Requirements]
- [x] CHK003 Are UI requirements defined for disambiguation and retry flows? [Completeness, Spec §Exception / Error Flows]

## Requirement Clarity

- [x] CHK004 Are formatting rules for currency and rounding specified clearly enough for UI display? [Clarity, Spec §Functional Requirements]
- [x] CHK005 Are warning messages specified clearly for missing baseline and missing features? [Clarity, Spec §Functional Requirements]

## Requirement Consistency

- [x] CHK006 Do functional requirements and acceptance scenarios align on attribute preservation and single-value display? [Consistency, Spec §Functional Requirements, Spec §Acceptance Scenarios]

## Non-Functional Requirements

- [x] CHK007 Are accessibility requirements defined for estimate display, warnings, and error states? [Completeness, Spec §Functional Requirements]
